summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - Team Invitation UI, Feedback Statistics, and Reminder Scheduler. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for TeamPage.js and StatisticsPage.js. Scheduler properly configured with both jobs.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/invitations/send - Admin sends invitation (200)
Backend: POST /api/invitations/send - All valid roles work (spravce, edukator, lektor, pokladni)
Backend: POST /api/invitations/send - Invalid role rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/invitations/pending - Lists pending invitations (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/invitations/{id} - Cancels invitation (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/invitations/{id} - 404 for non-existent invitation
Backend: Invitation endpoints require authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/team - Returns team members list (200)
Backend: GET /api/feedback/statistics - Returns feedback stats (200)
Backend: GET /api/feedback/statistics - Works with date filters
Backend: Feedback statistics requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/statistics - Monthly statistics (200)
Backend: GET /api/statistics - School year statistics (200)
Backend: GET /api/statistics - Semester statistics (200)
Backend: Scheduler module has all required functions
Backend: send_feedback_reminder_email function exists
Backend: Feedback model has reminder_sent_at field
Frontend: TeamPage - 'Pozvat kolegu' button opens invite dialog
Frontend: TeamPage - Invite dialog has name, email fields
Frontend: TeamPage - Role selection (all 4 roles) works
Frontend: TeamPage - Send invitation button works
Frontend: TeamPage - Pending invitations section displays
Frontend: TeamPage - Active members section displays
Frontend: TeamPage - Cancel invitation button works
Frontend: StatisticsPage - Main stat cards display (bookings, students, teachers, visitors)
Frontend: StatisticsPage - Period filters work (month, year)
Frontend: StatisticsPage - Charts render (4 charts found)
Frontend: StatisticsPage - Feedback section conditionally renders (hidden when no data)
critical_code_review_comments: TeamPage.js properly implements all data-testid attributes for testing
Invite dialog has proper form validation (email required)
Role selection uses radio buttons with clear descriptions
Pending invitations show expiry time correctly
StatisticsPage.js conditionally renders feedback section only when data exists
Scheduler has both jobs registered: process_completed_reservations (7:00 UTC) and process_feedback_reminders (8:00 UTC)
Feedback model has reminder_sent_at field for tracking reminder emails
All invitation endpoints properly require authentication
seed_data_creation: Test invitations created during testing (test_p1_*, test_role_*, ui_test_* emails). These are pending invitations that will expire in 48 hours.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested. TeamPage.js has complete invitation UI with dialog, pending invitations section, and active members list. StatisticsPage.js has feedback statistics section that only shows when feedbackStats.total_feedbacks > 0 (currently no feedback data exists). Scheduler has two jobs: process_completed_reservations (8AM CET) and process_feedback_reminders (9AM CET). Both jobs are registered and running. Feedback model has reminder_sent_at field for tracking. Valid roles: spravce, edukator, lektor, pokladni.

team_invitation_ui.role_options: PASS - All 4 roles (Správce, Edukátor, Externí lektor, Pokladní)
team_invitation_ui.send_invitation: PASS - Creates invitation and sends email
team_invitation_ui.pending_invitations_section: PASS - Shows pending invites with expiry
team_invitation_ui.active_members_section: PASS - Shows team members with roles

feedback_statistics.statistics_api: PASS - Returns total, avg rating, recommendation rate, by_rating, by_program
feedback_statistics.statistics_page_integration: PASS - Fetches and displays when data exists
feedback_statistics.conditional_rendering: PASS - Section hidden when no feedback data

reminder_scheduler.scheduler_module: PASS - All functions exist and are callable
reminder_scheduler.job_schedule: PASS - Runs daily at 9AM CET (8:00 UTC)
